title: erysimum humile subsp. gorbeanum
intro: Erysimum humile subsp. gorbeanum, also known as alpine wallflower, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Erysimum, belonging to the family Brassicaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Erysimum humile subsp. gorbeanum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
